---
name: Godot Documentation Freshness Rule
description: Use when changing architecture, components, data schemas, public behavior, or developer workflows. Require same-change documentation updates, migration notes, and explicit no-doc-change rationale when applicable.
---
# Godot Documentation Freshness Rule

## Cross-References
- Refer to `godot-expert-workflow.instructions.md` and applicable scoped companion instructions for precedence and details.

## Freshness Requirement
- When architecture or behavior changes, update relevant docs in the same change.
- Do not defer doc updates for non-trivial changes.

## Minimum Doc Updates
- What changed.
- Why it changed.
- How to integrate or migrate.
- Known limitations or temporary compatibility notes.

## Scope Guidance
- Update local feature docs for feature-specific changes.
- Update root README for broad workflow or architecture changes.
